auth.loginSubtitle: Supervise projects, visits, and reports from one workspace.
auth.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the authentication service. Try again shortly.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Live overview of projects, site visits, reports, and issues in your supervision workspace.
dashboard.overdueIssuesHint: Past due date and still open
dashboard.emptyProjectsDescription: Projects assigned to you will appear in this chart.
dashboard.emptyIssuesDescription: Open and overdue issues will show here when raised.
dashboard.emptyUpcomingDescription: Scheduled site visits from today onward will list here.
dashboard.emptyRecentDescription: Completed site visits will appear here.
dashboard.emptyWorkspaceDescription: When projects and site visits are assigned to you, this dashboard will fill with live metrics.
dashboard.errorDescription: We could not fetch supervision metrics from the API. Check your connection and try again.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Search, filter, and open supervision projects assigned to your workspace.
projects.createHint: Link a contract, set status, and add the primary site location.
projects.editHint: Changes are saved through the API. Unauthorized updates are rejected by the server.
projects.emptyDescription: Try adjusting filters, or create a project if you have manage access.
projects.mapEmptyDescription: Add latitude and longitude on the project or site locations to show the map.
projects.membersHint: Project team membership is managed on the project record.
projects.membersEmptyDescription: Add members by user ID when you have project manage access.
projects.stagesHint: Construction stages for planning and site-visit linkage.
projects.stagesEmptyDescription: Create the first stage to structure this project.
projects.contractEmptyDescription: This project does not have a contract reference.
projects.visitsEmptyDescription: Site visits for this project will appear here.
projects.issuesEmptyDescription: Issues raised on this project will appear here.
projects.reportsEmptyDescription: Reports for this project will appear here.
projects.noMeta: No client or location details yet.

fields.name: Name
fields.userIdHint: Enter the user’s UUID from the accounts system.
fields.title: Title
fields.author: Author

actions.deleteConfirm: Soft-delete this project? It will disappear from lists.

validation.coordPair: Latitude and longitude must both be set or both empty.

errors.loadListHint: The projects API did not respond successfully.
errors.loadDetailHint: Check your access or try again.
errors.notFound: This project was not found or is no longer available.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

siteVisits.title: Site visits
siteVisits.description: Field workflow for scheduling, check-in, checklists, and issues.
siteVisits.createHint: Assign yourself to a project and optionally set a schedule date.
siteVisits.emptyDescription: Create a visit to start the field workflow.

gps.label: GPS location
gps.unsupported: Geolocation is not available on this device.

camera.empty: Capture or choose a photo for the issue.

checklist.title: Inspection checklist
checklist.hint: Attach a template, answer items, then submit.
checklist.emptyDescription: Attach a template to start answering on site.

issues.title: Issues
issues.hint: Raise defects with optional GPS-tagged photos.
issues.emptyDescription: Create an issue when something needs follow-up.

offline.offlineHint: Actions will be queued locally until the connection returns. The API still enforces security when synced.
offline.queuedAction: Saved offline. Reconnect to sync with the server.

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to site visits.
errors.forbiddenHint: Ask an administrator if you need inspection access.
errors.loadListHint: Check your connection and try again.
errors.loadDetailHint: The visit may be missing or inaccessible.
errors.notFound: This site visit was not found.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Draft, review, approve, and send site-visit reports — with PDF preview.
reports.createHint: Start from a completed site visit. Approval actions are limited to authorized roles.
reports.emptyDescription: Create a draft from a completed site visit, or adjust filters.

preview.noIssues: No issues linked to this report.

workflow.title: Approval workflow
workflow.hint: Actions follow the API status machine. Only authorized users can approve.
workflow.noActionsHint: You may not have permission for the next step, or the report is waiting on another role.
workflow.terminalHint: This report has been sent and is complete.
workflow.approvalRestricted: Only admins and project managers can review, approve, reject, or send reports.

signatures.title: Digital signatures
signatures.hint: Capture supervisor, client, and approval signatures. Images are stored privately and embedded in generated PDFs with signer details and timestamps.
signatures.noPermission: You do not have permission to add a signature for the current report status.

pdf.title: PDF
pdf.hint: Generate a bilingual or single-language PDF, then preview or download.
pdf.emptyHint: Generate a PDF first, then open the preview.
pdf.readyHint: Use Preview or Download to open the file.

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to reports.
errors.forbiddenHint: Ask an administrator if you need report access.
errors.forbiddenAction: You are not authorized for this workflow action.
errors.loadListHint: Check your connection and try again.
errors.loadDetailHint: The report may be missing or inaccessible.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry or return to the dashboard.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you requested does not exist or was moved.

home.metaDescription: Construction, engineering consulting, and project supervision in Oman — founded in 2021 in Mabaila.
home.heroSupport: Expert construction, engineering consulting, and project supervision across Muscat and Oman.
home.contactAddress: Al Seeb, Al Mabaila, Sultanate of Oman
home.aboutP1: Founded in 2021 in Oman, Bonyan Consulting Company provides expert services in construction, engineering consulting, and project supervision. Based in Mabaila, we deliver high-quality, sustainable projects with a focus on client satisfaction, teamwork, and long-term community impact.
home.aboutP2: Our management team brings deep expertise across various engineering disciplines, allowing us to take on complex and diverse projects, including schools, commercial and residential buildings, luxury villas, compounds, and mosques, mainly in Muscat and surrounding rural areas.
home.serviceDesignBody: Creating detailed architectural and engineering layouts tailored to project needs and site conditions.
home.serviceValueBody: Optimizing project costs without compromising quality or functionality.
home.serviceFurnitureBody: We create and produce our product design lines.
home.serviceExteriorBody: We will help you to get the result you dreamed of.
home.serviceArchBody: Designing buildings and infrastructure to be functional, safe, and aesthetically pleasing.
home.serviceLandscapeBody: Planning outdoor spaces that blend function, beauty, and sustainability.
home.skillsIntro: We value integrity, quality, innovation, teamwork, sustainability, accountability, client focus, and continuous improvement in every project we deliver.
home.missionBody: To provide comprehensive and innovative construction and engineering consulting services, ensuring the successful completion of projects with the highest standards of quality, integrity, and client satisfaction.
home.visionBody: To be a leading force in Oman’s construction industry, recognized for our commitment to excellence, sustainability, and value-driven solutions, shaping a future of remarkable, enduring structures that benefit communities.
home.testimonial1Quote: Professional team with deep expertise. Bonyan Consulting delivered our project on time with outstanding quality and clear communication throughout. Highly recommend for anyone seeking reliable construction and consulting services in Oman.
home.testimonial2Quote: Exceptional service from start to finish. Bonyan handled everything professionally—planning, supervision, and execution. Their commitment to quality and client satisfaction truly stands out. We’re very happy with the final results!
home.testimonial3Quote: Working with Bonyan Consulting was a great experience. Their attention to detail and timely project delivery exceeded expectations. A trustworthy company that puts clients first. Highly recommended for engineering and construction needs.
home.teamQuote: The secret is a smoothly working team of disparate people who are each endowed with some special talent.
home.blogTeaser: Project stories, supervision notes, and practical ideas from our Oman delivery teams — coming soon.
home.footerCopyright: Copyright © by Nathan Smartway. All Rights Reserved.
